overview: Entangled Retrievals is a technology-enabled retrieval coordination platform that helps individuals safely recover personal belongings during emotionally difficult life transitions through professional coordination, scheduling, documentation, GPS tracking, and inventory management.
features: Public marketing site with animated hero and pricing
Customer booking flow with 7-step wizard and Stripe checkout
Live retrieval tracking with GPS dot on static map
Inventory builder with camera photo uploads
Customer dashboard with upcoming and active retrievals
